availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: FAST USB-C & USB-A CHARGING one USB-C Power Delivery outlet plus two USB-A smart ports share 3.1A to recharge phones, tablets and earbuds rapidly while both 13A mains sockets stay free for kettles, lamps or laptop bricks, keeping worktops uncluttered and adapters in drawers.

INDIVIDUAL SWITCH CONTROL separate rocker switches isolate each 13A outlet without yanking plugs, trimming standby waste and adding fingertip safety for children’s rooms, studios or late-night gamers swapping equipment between sessions.

SLEEK FLUSH FIT DESIGN slim gloss faceplate sits nearly flush on standard 25mm boxes, wiping clean of fingerprints and takeaway splashes, the crisp white finish matching modern sockets so rewire upgrades blend seamlessly across the whole house.

FULL 13A LOAD CAPACITY solid brass terminals accept up to 2.5mm² conductors and support 3120W loads for irons, heaters and coffee machines, while built-in shutters block curious fingers and dust to keep contacts protected year after year.

PRO INSTALL SAFETY NOTE isolate the 230V circuit at the consumer unit, verify dead with an approved tester and consult a qualified electrician if unsure—correct polarity, earth continuity and secure terminations are essential for safe long-term service.
description: Upgrade tired outlets and banish tabletop chargers with the STATUS 2-Gang USB Wall Socket. Each of its switched 13A sockets handles everyday appliances up to 3120W, while the integrated charging hub delivers a shared 3.1A through one USB-C and two USB-A ports—enough to fast-fill modern smartphones, power banks and Bluetooth speakers without hogging mains plugs. A slim gloss faceplate mounts on standard 25mm twin back boxes; captive screws and clearly embossed markings guide straightforward wiring, and spring shutters seal live parts when unused. Rocker switches let you shut individual outlets off to save standby energy and add an extra layer of safety in children’s bedrooms or rental flats. Built for British wiring-regulation peace of mind, the socket uses flame-retardant ABS and solid brass terminals, plus a BS-approved back-plate. Whether you are refreshing a home office, kitting out a student hall or modernising kitchen worktops, this STATUS unit delivers future-proof power and rapid USB charging in one tidy package—just ensure isolation and correct polarity before tightening the final screw.
